# Adyton Resources Corp.

> Adyton Resources (TSXV: ADY) is a gold and copper exploration company focused on building high-quality assets in Papua New Guinea.

Adyton Resources holds a portfolio of gold and copper projects across Papua New Guinea, including the Feni Island Gold-Copper Project and the Fergusson Island Gold Project. The company is positioned for near-term cash flow through its Fergusson Island JV with EVIH, and long-term discovery growth at Feni Island on the prolific Lihir gold corridor. Total combined resources exceed 2.4 million ounces of gold.

## Pages

- Home: https://adytonresources.com/ — Overview of Adyton's PNG gold-copper portfolio and investment thesis
- Feni Island Project: https://adytonresources.com/projects/feni — Flagship gold-copper project on the Lihir discovery corridor, 1.46 Moz Au inferred
- Fergusson Island Project: https://adytonresources.com/projects/fergusson — Near-term cash flow project with 939 koz Au, JV-funded by EVIH
- Investors: https://adytonresources.com/investors — Capital structure, ownership, presentations, and regulatory filings
- News: https://adytonresources.com/news — Press releases and corporate announcements
- About: https://adytonresources.com/about — Company overview, leadership team, and key milestones
- Why PNG: https://adytonresources.com/why-png — Papua New Guinea as a premier mining jurisdiction
- Contact: https://adytonresources.com/contact — Investor relations, media, and corporate contact information

## Projects

- Feni Island Gold-Copper Project: 100%-owned, 1.46 Moz Au inferred at Kabang, located on the +120 Moz Lihir Island Chain with significant copper upside
- Fergusson Island Gold Project: 939 koz Au combined resource (Wapolu + Gameta), 50/50 JV with EVIH committing US$9.5M to advance to production
- Wapolu Gold Project: Near-surface high-grade gold deposit with historical production, updated MRE filed Feb 2026
- Gameta Gold Deposit: 513 koz Au resource open in all directions, 87% gold recovery to concentrate
